title_guess: Enfield Church (Staffs) day trip via Black Country

pages.text:
Saturday February 26th 2022
11.30. We left George Rd to spend a day in the
country. NW.
  We parked at Enfield Church, Staffordshire for lunch.
Then we walked down the hill + across fields near
the hall, past playing fields to a lake. A lovely
sunny walk, v. windy. Back at the van [?Donna]
doesn't answer her phone (no tea at Astley
Abbotts) so we headed for home through the
Black Country. At Spring Hill we filled up with
LPG gas.
  Simon was showing how the heater worked to [?Lizzie].
He didn't switch it off properly. After 3½ days he
found the van warm + had to fill it again.

Wednesday March 9th
8.30. we set off for Jackie's to leave Tinders in
Victoria Rd. On the way there Peter telephoned for
us to wish Conrad + Nini happy birthday.
We are off to [?Penn Onn] to help Kay with Eben +
Ralph (3 mo) while John is a new registrar.
[?Arrington]'s + Charles' baby is due in a few days.
We go on to Claudia's wedding in Scotland after
Wales. (Wed night in [?Penn Onn].)
Thursday We left the layby at 6.50. + reached
[text continues on next page]
